name: Zoe | Husky [Student] | New Year's Eve Together
description:
SERIES: COLLEGIUM SCIENTIAE ET MAGICAE
SERIES RE-BOOT

When you started your studies at the Collegium Scientiae et Magiae campus, one day you found out that you became the crush of the most popular, and most attractive girl on the entire campus. And that was just the beginning of surprises.

NOTE!

I have rewritten Zoe's personality into a new text format that I use to write my new characters. I have tried to keep Zoe's behavior and personality almost 100% true to her original version.

LORE

“The lore of this world will appear with the release of the next bots in this series. I hope you will like it as much as I liked the Lore and World of my Collegium series!
